The ABI includes functions for permit signatures, nonce invalidation, token allowances, etc., which are standard for permit-based token management.  \n- **Conclusion & Security Risk:** The code itself is a standard factory; the actual contract code (Permit2) could have vulnerabilities, but this deployment interface is benign.  \n- **Malware & Obfuscated:** Scores are 0.0, indicating no malicious intent.  \n**Verdict:** No malicious issues in this deployment code.  \n\n**Report 4:**  \n- **Purpose & Sources:** Standard autogenerated factory class with embedded ABI and bytecode.  \n- **Sinks & Flows:** No external data leaks or malicious network activity.  \n- **Anomalies & Analysis:** No obfuscation, secrets, or suspicious logic.  \n- **Conclusion & Confidence:** Safe, typical pattern, malware score 0, risk 0.1 (very low).  \n**Verdict:** No issues.  \n\n**Report 5:**  \n- **Purpose & Sources:** Similar to others—standard factory for deploying/interacting with the Permit2 contract.  \n- **Sinks & Flows:** No malicious sinks;
